description: Style NoteMake a style statement effortlessly with this simply silhouetted  leatherette  handbag from hidekraft. With short handles and three main compartments, this bag makes for a fab combination of style and practicality.Product DetailsHandbag with a flap with magnetic button closure and branding embossed on the frontHas a short handle to carry ease and style  Three main compartments with a zippered pocket and organizer sleeves in the middle compartmentMaterial and CareLeatheretteWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 23 cmWidth: 43 cm
